events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing drip loop is a code-compliance defect under NEC 230.54(F), which requires service entrance conductors to form a drip loop below the point of entry so water can't track into the weatherhead, raceway, or meter enclosure. Marked `fail` with `medium` risk, corrective actions listed (reform conductors, verify loop position, reseal entry point, reinspect before energization).
